category_sources: source_facts.description identifies VICE as the Versatile Commodore Emulator.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description expands the product as Versatile Commodore Emulator; official website uses the VICE name.
docs_sources: Official VICE website hosts the project homepage, manual table of contents, and PDF manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; the official VICE website says the source repository moved to SourceForge, and SourceForge hosts the VICE code browser.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states Versatile Commodore Emulator; source_facts.executables lists emulator binaries such as x64, x128, xvic, and xpet.
